# datetime_utils.py
import datetime

# Correct: separate utilities into domain-specific modules
def format_timestamp(ts):
    return datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(ts).isoformat()

# s3_utils.py
import boto3

def upload_to_s3(filepath, bucket):
    s3 = boto3.client('s3')
    s3.upload_file(filepath, bucket, filepath)
